cardInfo.description: Complete student record for Marcus Johnson

medical.medicalConditions: Type 1 Diabetes - diagnosed 2021. Uses insulin pump (Omnipod). Blood glucose monitoring required before lunch and snacks.

medications.notes: Nurse must be notified of any pump alarms. Emergency glucagon kit in health office.
Only trained staff should administer. Call 911 after use.

medical.dietaryRestrictions:
**Diabetes Management**

Carbohydrate counting required for all meals and snacks. No restrictions on food types, but portions must be reported to nurse for insulin dosing.

Always have fast-acting sugar available (juice box in desk).
medical.medicalNotes:
**Diabetes Care Plan on file - updated September 2024**

Target blood glucose: 80-180 mg/dL

Low protocol: <80 = 15g fast carbs, recheck in 15 min
High protocol: >300 = notify nurse, check ketones

Parent should be called if BG >350 or <60, or if ketones present.

emergencyContacts.name: Gloria Johnson
emergencyContacts.notes: Lives nearby in Brooklyn. Usually first choice if mom unavailable.

emergencyContacts.name: Angela Williams
emergencyContacts.notes: Works in Midtown, can respond in ~30 min

family.householdNotes: Single-parent household. Mother works rotating shifts at hospital. Grandmother provides significant support. Family has been through difficult custody situation - student has shown resilience but may need extra emotional support.

custody.custodyNotes: Mother has sole legal and physical custody per court order dated 2022-03-15. Father has supervised visitation only - NOT to be released to father without court-appointed supervisor present.

authorizedPickups.name: Gloria Johnson
authorizedPickups.notes: Regular pickup on Tuesdays and Thursdays

restrictedPersons.name: Derek Johnson
restrictedPersons.description: Per custody order, father may not pick up student without court-appointed supervisor. Supervised visitation only.
restrictedPersons.actionIfAppears: Do NOT release student. Contact mother immediately at (917) 555-0777. If he refuses to leave, contact school security and call 911.

custody.legalDocuments:
**Court documents on file:**
- Custody order (2022-03-15)
- Restraining order modification (2023-01-10)
- Supervised visitation schedule

All documents in student's confidential folder in main office.

financial.billingNotes: Full scholarship recipient - Tribeca Community Fund. Annual renewal required. Application submitted for 2025-26.

iep.accommodations:
**504 Plan for Type 1 Diabetes**

**Health Accommodations:**
- Unlimited bathroom breaks
- Access to water and snacks at all times
- Blood glucose testing before lunch, snacks, PE, and as needed
- Permission to leave class without asking if feeling low
- Rest in health office if blood sugar out of range

**Academic Accommodations:**
- Extended time on tests if BG event occurs during testing
- Make-up work without penalty for diabetes-related absences
- Access to phone to communicate with parents about health
